steps.title: Use the expectation clue
steps.content: Moreno's readers appreciate that she thwarts expectations and avoids formulaic plots and themes. The blank must describe what she refuses to do with genre conventions.

steps.title: Reject weaker verbs
steps.content: A means challenge, B means respond to, and C means notice or understand; none captures following conventions. The sentence needs the idea of obeying or fitting established patterns. The answer is D.
